uplink.description: Sensor event (protocol v2): vibration conditions 0/2/4 active, button trigger -> action.motion detected, count 3, air.temperature + raw RMS/acceleration extras
uplink._note: Upstream TTN sensor-event example input; expected.data authored here. Header 0x23 = protocol v2, msg type 3 (sensor_event). detected=true because 3 condition bits are set (count>0); trigger byte 1 = button. RMS velocity/acceleration/temperature min/max/avg match the upstream wire decode exactly (uint16/100, int16/100). air.temperature is temperature.avg = 0x1F40/100 = 80.

uplink.description: Sensor event (protocol v2): no condition active and timer trigger -> action.motion.detected false, count 0
uplink._note: Synthetic ORACLE vector. Header 0x23 = protocol v2, msg type 3. trigger byte 0 = timer, condition byte 0 -> no vibration condition active, so action.motion.detected=false and count=0. temperature.avg = 0x012C/100 = 3 C; min 0x0964/100=24.04, max 0x07C8/100=19.92.

uplink.description: Device status (protocol v2): battery (settle voltage, V) + air.temperature (avg)
uplink._note: Synthetic ORACLE vector. Header 0x24 = protocol v2, msg type 4 (device_status). battery uses settle voltage 3650 mV -> 3.65 V (vocabulary battery is volts). temperature avg int8 = 25 C -> air.temperature. Cross-checked against reference upstream decode (battery_voltage.settle, temperature.avg).
Upstream TTN error example. Header 0x34 -> protocol_version 3, which neither upstream nor this codec supports.

uplink.description: Unsupported message type (boot, type 0) carries no normalized measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic. Header 0x20 = protocol v2, msg type 0 (boot). Boot/activated/deactivated/sensor_data spectra are not measurement data; the codec rejects them rather than emit a bare object.
Synthetic. Header 0x23 = sensor_event but only 6 bytes instead of the required 45; length guard fires.
